examples.title: Log-Based Recovery
examples.code:
PROCEDURE Rollback(trans_id)
  FOR EACH log_entry IN reverse_order WHERE trans=trans_id
    IF log_entry.type == 'UPDATE'
      WRITE log_entry.old_value TO page
    WRITE <ABORT, trans_id> TO log
END
examples.explanation: Reverses updates using before-images from log
